summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No merge action is safe from the hydrated artifact because mergeability is unknown and no required Codex /review merge preflight is present; two PRs are also labeled waiting on author and one has a failing Telegram proof check.

actions.reason: Ready-looking PR, but a merge recommendation requires current mergeability plus Codex /review proof; the artifact does not include that proof.
Focused and plausibly mergeable after final preflight, but the required merge proof is absent from the artifact.
Active author-followup label and session-state/compatibility risk require maintainer review before finalization.
Active author-followup label and message-delivery risk require maintainer review before finalization.
The failing Telegram proof check blocks merge/finalization until the failure is inspected or repaired.
